code:
import io
import string
import list

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if in_num
          result = list.push(result, val * sign)
          in_num = false
          sign = 1
          val = 0
        end
      else if b == 45
        sign = -1
        in_num = true
      else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    result = list.push(result, val * sign)
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if list.contains(b, x)
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    if not list.contains(result, x)
      mut new_list: List<Int> = []
      mut inserted = false
      for y in result
        if not inserted
          if x < y
            new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
            inserted = true
          end
        end
        new_list = list.push(new_list, y)
      end
      if not inserted
        new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
      end
      result = new_list
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = read_or_empty()
let line2 = read_or_empty()

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_unique(inter)

if list.len(sorted) == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in sorted
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
